data.name: CheckEmailVerification
data.value: Please check your email for a verification link.

data.name: VerificationEmailFailed
data.value: We could not send a verification email. Please contact support or try again later.

data.name: TooManySignInAttempts
data.value: Too many sign-in attempts. Please try again in a minute.

data.name: VerifyEmailFirst
data.value: Please verify your email before signing in.

data.name: TwoFactorCodeSent
data.value: We sent a 6-digit code to your email.

data.name: TwoFactorCodeFailed
data.value: We could not send the verification code. Please try again.

data.name: EmailVerified
data.value: Email verified. You are now signed in.

data.name: TooManyVerificationAttempts
data.value: Too many verification attempts. Please try again in a minute.

data.name: VerificationCodeInvalid
data.value: Verification code is invalid or expired.

data.name: PasswordResetEmailSent
data.value: If an account with that email exists, we sent a password reset link.

data.name: InvalidResetToken
data.value: Invalid or expired password reset link.

data.name: PasswordResetSuccess
data.value: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.

data.name: LabelTooLong
data.value: Label must be 128 characters or fewer.

data.name: ExpirationMustBeFuture
data.value: Expiration must be in the future.

data.name: OriginsRequired
data.value: At least one valid origin (https or localhost) is required for browser tokens.

data.name: StripeCustomerError
data.value: Could not create Stripe customer. Please try again.

data.name: SelectAtLeastOneDocument
data.value: Select at least 1 document to purchase credits.

data.name: PaymentStartFailed
data.value: Payment could not be started. Please try again.

data.name: PaymentAlreadyProcessed
data.value: This payment has already been processed.

data.name: PaymentSessionMismatch
data.value: This payment session does not belong to your account.

data.name: CreditsAdded
data.value: Added {0} document credits to your account. You can find invoice in the list below in few moments.

data.name: NoSavedPaymentMethod
data.value: No saved payment method found. Please buy credits with "Save card" checked first.

data.name: ManagePaymentMethodDescription
data.value: Update, replace or remove your saved card via secure Stripe portal.

data.name: SaveCardLabel
data.value: Save my card for future purchases and auto-recharge

data.name: SaveCardHint
data.value: Your card will be stored securely by Stripe. You can remove it anytime.

data.name: NoCardOnFile
data.value: No card on file. Save one during your next purchase.

data.name: ConcurrencyLimitDescription
data.value: Limit how many API requests can run in parallel for your account. Higher values use tiered credit pricing.

data.name: ConcurrencyQueueTimeoutDescription
data.value: 0 = reject immediately (429). Greater than 0 = wait up to N seconds for a free slot before returning 429.

data.name: ServerAtCapacity
data.value: Server is at full capacity. Please retry in a few seconds.

data.name: InvalidConcurrencyLimit
data.value: Concurrency limit must be between 1 and 50 (leave empty for default).

data.name: ConcurrencyPricingDescription
data.value: Running more operations in parallel uses tiered credit pricing:

data.name: ConfigureConcurrencyLink
data.value: Configure max parallelism in API Tokens settings →

data.name: EnterpriseModeDescription
data.value: Enterprise users bypass credit checks and are billed manually based on tracked usage. Enabling this disables auto-recharge and detaches saved payment methods.

data.name: ConfirmEnableEnterprise
data.value: This will disable auto-recharge and detach the saved payment method. Continue?

data.name: ConfirmDisableEnterprise
data.value: The user will be billed by credits again. Continue?

data.name: EnterpriseEnabled
data.value: Enterprise mode enabled. Auto-recharge disabled and payment methods detached.

data.name: PresignError
data.value: An error occurred during the presign process

data.name: FieldsRequired
data.value: At least one field definition is required.

data.name: TemplateCreateError
data.value: An error occurred while creating the template

data.name: TemplateRetrieveError
data.value: An error occurred while retrieving the template

data.name: AiDetectionFailed
data.value: AI detection failed. Check AI configuration and try again.

data.name: ColumnsRequired
data.value: At least one column definition is required.

data.name: AiExtractionFailed
data.value: AI data extraction failed. Check AI configuration and try again.

data.name: ProvideAtLeastOneChange
data.value: Provide at least one change (fields, pdfContent, or templateName).

data.name: TemplateUpdateError
data.value: An error occurred while updating the template

data.name: TemplateDeleteError
data.value: An error occurred while deleting the template

data.name: SigningDataNotFound
data.value: Signing data not found for the provided ID.

data.name: SignError
data.value: An error occurred during the final signing process

data.name: PfxSignError
data.value: An error occurred during the PFX signing process

data.name: TimestampError
data.value: An error occurred while applying the timestamp

data.name: VisualSignError
data.value: An error occurred while applying the visual signature

data.name: SealError
data.value: An error occurred while applying the seal

data.name: AttachmentError
data.value: An error occurred while adding the attachment

data.name: PdfaConversionError
data.value: An error occurred while converting the document to PDF/A

data.name: ProvideTemplateOrPdf
data.value: Provide either TemplateId or PdfContent (but not both).

data.name: FieldsRequiredForDirectPdf
data.value: Fields are required when using PdfContent directly.

data.name: DataSetRequired
data.value: At least one data set is required.

data.name: FillPdfError
data.value: An error occurred while filling the PDF

data.name: ScanCodesError
data.value: An error occurred while scanning codes

data.name: NoCreditsRemaining
data.value: No credits remaining. Please purchase more to continue.

data.name: TooManyRequests
data.value: Too many concurrent requests. Please slow down.

data.name: UnexpectedError
data.value: We hit an unexpected error while processing your request.

data.name: EnterpriseBillingManaged
data.value: Your account is on enterprise billing — credit purchases and auto-recharge are managed by your account manager.

data.name: EnterpriseBillingDescription
data.value: Your account is billed based on tracked usage. Credit purchases and auto-recharge are disabled.

data.name: HomeSignupSuccess
data.value: Your account is ready. Welcome to P4PDF.

data.name: HomeHeroTitle
data.value: Generate, fill, sign and process PDF documents with one API.

data.name: HomeHeroDescription
data.value: P4PDF turns your data into complete PDF documents. Render templates, fill dynamic fields, apply digital signatures and timestamps, embed attachments, and read QR or barcodes — all fully automated.

data.name: HomeCodeFooter
data.value: See full reference in the docs.

data.name: HomeFeatureGenerateDescription
data.value: Upload a PDF template and define dynamic fields for text, images and barcodes. Map your data directly into placeholders and render consistent documents at scale.

data.name: HomeVisualFieldMappingDescription
data.value: Click and define text fields, images or barcodes directly on the PDF.

data.name: HomeDynamicDataBindingDescription
data.value: Fill templates using structured JSON — no manual formatting.

data.name: HomeFeatureSigningDescription
data.value: Apply certificate-based signatures, add trusted timestamps (TSA), and automate hashing workflows with full cryptographic integrity.

data.name: HomeCertificateSigningDescription
data.value: Support for external signers, HSM, smartcards or custom clients.

data.name: HomeTrustedTimestampsDescription
data.value: Integrate with any TSA to add verifiable timestamp tokens.

data.name: HomeMultipleSignaturesDescription
data.value: Support for multi-party, multi-step signing workflows.

data.name: HomeFeatureAttachmentsDescription
data.value: Store supporting documentation such as raw data, reports or logs directly inside the PDF to create verifiable document bundles.

data.name: HomeAnyFileTypeDescription
data.value: Attach binary files, datasets or custom audit outputs.

data.name: HomeEvidenceBundlesDescription
data.value: Keep measurements, logs and certificates in a single container.

data.name: HomeMetadataSupportDescription
data.value: Store attachment metadata for validation or audit trails.

data.name: HomeFeatureCodesDescription
data.value: Detect and extract QR codes, Datamatrix and other barcode types from any PDF page, including coordinates and orientation.

data.name: HomeMultiCodeDescription
data.value: Scan pages with multiple QR/Datamatrix codes.

data.name: HomeCoordinatesDescription
data.value: Extract the exact x/y position and size of each code.

data.name: HomeErrorCorrectionDescription
data.value: Robust decoding of damaged or low-quality codes.

data.name: SignInFailedMsg
data.value: Sign-in failed. Please check your email and password.

data.name: ForgotPasswordHint
data.value: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

data.name: NewPasswordSameAsCurrent
data.value: New password must be different from the current one.

data.name: TwoFactorCodeSentMsgFmt
data.value: We sent a 6-digit code to {0}. Enter it below to finish signing in.

data.name: VerificationLinkSent
data.value: We sent you a verification link.

data.name: EmailNotificationsHint
data.value: Billing updates and auto-recharge alerts. Critical emails (invoices, security) are always sent.

data.name: SupportDesc
data.value: Submit a support ticket and our team will get back to you.

data.name: ErrorTraceMsg
data.value: Use this trace ID if you contact support:

data.name: CancelAutoRechargeQuestion
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel automatic credit recharging?

data.name: CancelAutoRechargeNote
data.value: You can re-enable it at any time from your billing page.

data.name: PricingDesc
data.value: Transparent pricing for signing PDFs via API. No credit card required to get started.

data.name: PricingFreeDesc
data.value: For individual developers and small tests.

data.name: TemplatesNoTemplates
data.value: No templates yet. Create one to get started.

data.name: LegalDescription
data.value: Here you can find all legal and policy documents related to the use of the P4PDF by Performance4 s.r.o. service.

data.name: RequestsSubtitle
data.value: Detailed log of your recent API requests, credit usage, and failed operations. Document and signature contents are never recorded.

data.name: RequestsPrivacyNote
data.value: Privacy: only request metadata is stored (operation name, status, credits, duration). PDF contents, signatures, certificates, and other request bodies are never logged.

data.name: Error_PDF_SIZE_EXCEEDED
data.value: The PDF file exceeds the maximum allowed size.

data.name: Error_IMAGE_SIZE_EXCEEDED
data.value: The image file exceeds the maximum allowed size.

data.name: Error_ATTACHMENT_SIZE_EXCEEDED
data.value: The attachment exceeds the maximum allowed size.

data.name: Error_FIELDS_REQUIRED
data.value: At least one field definition is required.

data.name: Error_PDF_CONTENT_REQUIRED_NO_TEMPLATE
data.value: PDF content is required when no template is provided.

data.name: Error_DATA_REQUIRED
data.value: At least one data set is required to fill the PDF.

data.name: Error_TEMPLATE_NO_FIELDS
data.value: The stored template does not contain field definitions.

data.name: Error_TEMPLATE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Template not found or not accessible.

data.name: Error_PRESIGNED_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Pre-signed PDF not found. Please restart the signing process.

data.name: Error_TSA_NOT_CONFIGURED
data.value: A timestamp authority must be configured to apply timestamps.

data.name: Error_NO_SIGNATURE_FIELD
data.value: The template does not contain a signature field.

data.name: Error_PFX_NO_PRIVATE_KEY
data.value: No private key entry found in the provided PFX file.

data.name: Error_ENCRYPTION_NO_RECIPIENTS
data.value: At least one recipient certificate is required for evidence encryption.

data.name: Error_TSA_HTTPS_REQUIRED
data.value: The timestamp authority URL must use HTTPS.

data.name: Error_FIELD_NAME_INVALID
data.value: Field name must contain only letters, numbers, underscore or dash.

data.name: Error_FIELD_TYPE_INVALID
data.value: Unsupported field type. Allowed: text, image, barcode, signature, table.

data.name: Error_FIELD_HALIGN_INVALID
data.value: Horizontal alignment must be one of: left, center, right.

data.name: Error_FIELD_VALIGN_INVALID
data.value: Vertical alignment must be one of: top, center, bottom.

data.name: Error_FIELD_FONTSIZE_INVALID
data.value: Font size must be between 5 and 128.

data.name: Error_FIELD_FONTWEIGHT_INVALID
data.value: Font weight must be one of: tiny, normal, bold.

data.name: Error_FIELD_FONTNAME_INVALID
data.value: Font name must be one of: Helvetica, Times-Roman, Courier, Symbol, ZapfDingbats.

data.name: Error_FIELD_BARCODE_UNSUPPORTED
data.value: The specified barcode format is not supported.

data.name: Error_TABLE_COLUMNS_ZERO
data.value: Table must have at least one column.

data.name: Error_TABLE_COLUMNS_MISMATCH
data.value: The number of column definitions does not match the declared column count.

data.name: Error_TABLE_COLUMN_WIDTH_INVALID
data.value: Table column width percentage must be between 0 and 100.

data.name: Error_TABLE_COLUMN_FONTSIZE_INVALID
data.value: Table column font size must be between 5 and 128.

data.name: Error_TABLE_COLUMN_FONTWEIGHT_INVALID
data.value: Table column font weight must be one of: tiny, normal, bold.

data.name: Error_TABLE_COLUMN_HALIGN_INVALID
data.value: Table column horizontal alignment must be one of: left, center, right.

data.name: Error_TABLE_COLUMN_VALIGN_INVALID
data.value: Table column vertical alignment must be one of: top, center, bottom.

data.name: Error_TABLE_COLUMN_BORDER_INVALID
data.value: Table column border must be one of: none, dashed, filled.

data.name: Error_TABLE_NO_COLUMNS
data.value: Table field must define at least one column.
